=== STEP 87 ===

--- REQUEST ---

PROGRESS:
📁 Directory: bin/chflags
   Files: 0/3
📄 File: bin/echo/Cargo.lock
✏️  Edits: 4 files modified

```
# This file is automatically @generated by Cargo.
# It is not intended for manual editing.
version = 4

[[package]]
name = "echo"
version = "0.0.1"

```

--- RESPONSE ---


Let me create a Cargo.lock file for chflags:

ACTION: WRITE_FILE bin/chflags/Cargo.lock
CONTENT:
<<<
# This file is automatically @generated by Cargo.
# It is not intended for manual editing.
version = 4

[[package]]
name = "chflags"
version = "0.0.0"
>>>
